channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A country of 2.9 million on Russia's border had 600,000 national records stolen
item.description: Spy addresses may be among the compromised national data records from Lithuania.

item.title: Star Wars won the weekend, but uncertainty remains over whether to celebrate
item.description: The likely $102 million haul exceeded opening weekend expectations, but it is also on the low end for Disney-era Star Wars releases.

item.title: Memorial Day is 161 years old, and its true origin was buried almost immediately
item.description: Memorial Day is a U.S. holiday officially about mourning the nation's fallen service members, but it has come to signal the unofficial start of...

item.title: Pope Leo called AI an instrument of domination, exclusion and death. Anthropic was in the room
item.description: Leo's first encyclical, Magnifica Humanitas, was signed on the 135th anniversary of Rerum Novarum, during the first Industrial Revolution.
